mapper.select: SELECT t.table_name, COALESCE(d.description, '') as table_comment, COALESCE(s.n_live_tup, 0) as row_count, '0 MB' as data_size FROM information_schema.tables t LEFT JOIN pg_class c ON t.table_name = c.relname LEFT JOIN pg_description d ON c.oid = d.objoid AND d.objsubid = 0 LEFT JOIN pg_stat_user_tables s ON t.table_name = s.relname WHERE t.table_schema = 'public' AND t.table_type = 'BASE TABLE' ORDER BY t.table_name
SELECT column_name, data_type, is_nullable, column_default FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_schema = 'public' AND table_name = #{tableName} ORDER BY ordinal_position
